ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lyrics for the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the song */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been downloaded */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is premium content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_lyric_id FOREIGN KEY ("lyric_id") REFERENCES lyrics ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "discography" TEXT /* Discography of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary genre of the artist */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's cover art */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the album */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is premium content */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the album's producer */,
  "recording_location" TEXT /* Location where the album was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lyric */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song the lyric belongs to */,
  "lyric_text" TEXT /* Text of the lyric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of user IDs who can collaborate on the playlist */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the playlist has been played */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song being commented on */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_albums" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_albums" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, playlist creation) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., energy, danceability) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
